message:
chore: bump version to 1.0.6

Release includes:
- Fix release workflow build failures (missing rich_rust dependency)
- Fix CI ARM64 build (linker env var issue)
- Fix clippy collapsible_if warnings
- Update toolchain to nightly-2025-11-01

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-version = "1.0.5"
+version = "1.0.6"

  "blake3",
